
# Consciousness Taxonomy

## Chapter Purpose

Classify major approaches to consciousness, including biological, computational, information-based, quantum, and metaphysical models.

## Suggested Topics

- 
- 
- 

## Suggested Figures or Tables

- 
- 
- 

## Key Questions

- 
- 
- 

## Notes

Add examples, references, equations, diagrams, case studies, or comparative discussions here.
